---
title: &TITLE Rich Bingham
last: Bingham
first: Rich
subtitle: "Lecturer in Mathematics & Biology"
people_group: "academic"
email: "your@email.com"
education:
  - PhD Theoretical Biophysics | University of Leeds <br> Mphys  Theoretical Physics | University of Leeds  
description: "This is not used in this template"
image: richard-1-510x655.jpg
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
about: 
  id: about
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image: richard-1-510x655.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your@email.com
editor: 'source'
---

<hr>

::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}
:::

<br>

## Research Interests

I am interested in quantitative analysis of all kinds of sports, with a focus on questions that can provide insight to competitors. I enjoy working on big data sets, trying to extract interesting arguments.

## {{< meta first >}}' blogs

::: {#blogs}
:::

<br>

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
